descriptionHtml:
North Wind 58 for sale 2004 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a reliable cruiser to take you on your next adventure, the North Wind 58 for sale 2004 presents a well-maintained option currently available under a private owner. The yacht is registered under the Polish flag and is offered VAT not paid. She stands in good condition, having undergone several upgrades in recent years, and is well set up for comfortable long-range cruising or living aboard.

Recent improvements have kept the yacht in good condition. Notably, the sails were replaced in 2022, and both the sprayhood and bimini were renewed in 2023. The batteries were also updated in 2023.

Here are the specifications for the North Wind 58 for sale 2004:

Specifications

  • Boat type: Furling
  • Cabins: 3
  • Heads: 3
  • Length Over All (LOA): 17.68 m
  • Beam: 4.95 m
  • Draft: 2.5 m
  • Fuel Tank: 800 lt
  • Water Tank: 1000 lt
  • Engine: Volvo D3, 150 HP
  • Steering wheel: 1
  • Air conditioning: Yes
  • Generator: 9 kW (2,500h)
  • Autopilot: NKE
  • GPS: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes (2023)
  • Deck shower: Yes
  • Electric fridge: Yes
  • Sound system: Radio, cockpit speakers, CD
  • Outboard: Yes
  • Dinghy: Yes
  • Sails: 2022
  • Sprayhood: 2023
  • Batteries: 2023
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Dishwasher: Yes
  • Flag: Polish

This particular North Wind 58 for sale 2004 is a private yacht, and has been maintained carefully by her owner. She offers versatility, from family sailing to entertaining guests or crossing oceans. If you’re seeking a proven bluewater yacht, in good condition with recent upgrades, this vessel is well worth considering. She is available now for viewing and inspection, contact us!
